name: buddyai
description: FinBot — Thai personal-finance LINE bot on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.db:init: wrangler d1 execute finance-db --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --local --file=migrations/0002_add_alert_subscribed.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --local --file=migrations/0003_portfolios.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --local --file=migrations/0005_events.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --local --file=migrations/0006_portfolio_naming.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --local --file=migrations/0007_news_subscribed.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --local --file=migrations/0008_portfolio_snapshots.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute finance-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_add_alert_subscribed.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --remote --file=migrations/0003_portfolios.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --remote --file=migrations/0005_events.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --remote --file=migrations/0006_portfolio_naming.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --remote --file=migrations/0007_news_subscribed.sql && wrangler d1 execute finance-db --remote --file=migrations/0008_portfolio_snapshots.sql
